title: Regolamenti dwar Ħlas iktar tard tad-Dazju tas-Sisa Pagabbli fix-Xhur ta’ April u ta’ Mejju 2020
title_en: Regolamenti dwar Ħlas iktar tard tad-Dazju tas-Sisa Pagabbli fix-Xhur ta’ April u ta’ Mejju 2020
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/382.3/mlt, expression eli/sl/382.3/20220208/mlt).

provisions.title: (il-verżjoni bl-Ingliż biss)
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-regolamenti hu r-Regolamenti dwar
Ħlas iktar tard tad-Dazju tas-Sisa Pagabbli fix-Xhur ta’ April u ta’ Mejju

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
F’dawn ir-regolamenti, kemm-il darba r-rabta tal-kliem
ma teħtieġx xort’oħra:

Tifsiriet.

"l-Att" ifisser l-Att dwar id-Dazju tas-Sisa; u

Kap. 382.

"dazju" tfisser id-dazju impost bl-Att.

provisions.title: Tifsiriet
provisions.content:
Id-dazju tas-sisa fuq l-oġġetti u s-servizzi kollha pagabbli
f’dati differenti matul ix-xahar ta’ April 2020 skont l-Att qed ikun
dikjarat li hu pagabbli sittin (60) jum wara, iżda mhux iktar tard mit-28
ta’ Ġunju 2020, u d-dazju tas-sisa fuq l-oġġetti u s-servizzi kollha
pagabbli f’dati differenti matul ix-xahar ta’ Mejju 2020 skont l-Att qed
ikun dikjarat li hu pagabbli sittin (60) jum wara, iżda mhux iktar tard
mis-26 ta’ Lulju 2020.

Dazju pagabbli
f’April 2020 hu
pagabbli f’Ġunju
2020 u dazju
pagabbli f’Mejju
2020 hu pagabbli
f’Lulju 2020.
